description: Two fragments of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Only the text in the right margin, is preserved, containing expressions of condolence apparently on the death of a son of the addressee, referring to 'sufferings of love' and ending, וכדא יפעל [אללה] תעאלי כצצתה באתם אלסלם וולדה אפצל אלסלם. The first few letters of about a dozen lines from the main text block are preserved, but almost no complete words.
